creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 201387
maxima update 5.42.2

Changelog:
https://sourceforge.net/p/maxima/code/ci/master/tree/ChangeLog-5.42.md

The port is almost unchanged: only thing that needed to be modified was adding USE+= makeinfo.

I tested successfully with poudriere on 11.2-RELEASE i386/amd64 and 12.0-RELEASE i386/amd64.
